samples.xml_description:
<module id="signal_generator">
    <description>Triangle Wave signal generator.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <output id="wave" width_description="[4:0]">Output waveform signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state description="Incrementing state">0</state>
        <state description="Decrementing state">1</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
    The module generates a triangular waveform by incrementing and decrementing a 5-bit signal named "wave". 
    The waveform cycles between 0 and 31 by first incrementing from a reset state of 0 and then decrementing back down to 0. 
    The state transitions are controlled by an internal state variable.
    </implementation>
</module>
